title: helianthemum × alicantinum
intro: Helianthemum × alicantinum is a hybrid species of flowering plant, resulting from the cross between Helianthemum alpestre and Helianthemum nummularium, commonly known as rockrose or sunrose. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum × alicantinum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
